candel
  • API Reference
  • candel.pvdata
  • View page source

candel.pvdata

Data loading and preprocessing utilities for peculiar-velocity catalogues.

Provides dataframe-like containers, LOS interpolation helpers, covariance assembly, and catalogue I/O wired to the project config files.

candel.pvdata.data.effective_rank_entropy(C)[source]

Compute the entropy-based effective rank (Shannon effective rank) of C.

https://www.eurasip.org/Proceedings/Eusipco/Eusipco2007/Papers/a5p-h05.pdf

candel.pvdata.data.precompute_pixel_projection(rhat_data, nside, sigma_deg=None)[source]

Precompute the pixel projection matrix for a given set of LOS vectors.

candel.pvdata.data.load_PV_dataframes(config_path)[source]

Loads PV dataframes from the given configuration file.

class candel.pvdata.data.PVDataFrame(data, los_radial_decay_scale=5)[source]

Bases: object

Lightweight container for PV data.

add_eta_truncation = False
classmethod from_config_dict(config, name, try_pop_los, config_pv_model)[source]
subsample(nsamples, los_radial_decay_scale, seed=42)[source]

Returns a new frame with randomly selected nsamples. Keeps all calibrators in the sample (if present), and updates associated calibration fields accordingly.

keys()[source]
property num_calibrators
candel.pvdata.data.load_los(los_data_path, data, mask=None, verbose=True)[source]
candel.pvdata.data.load_SH0ES_calibration(calibration_path, pgc_CF4)[source]

Load SH0ES distance modulus samples and match to CF4 galaxies by PGC ID.

candel.pvdata.data.load_CF4_data(root, which_band, best_mag_quality=True, eta_min=-0.3, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, remove_outliers=True, calibration=None, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, dust_model=None, exclude_W1=False, **kwargs)[source]

Load CF4 TFR data and apply optional filters and dust correction removal.

candel.pvdata.data.load_CF4_mock(root, index)[source]
candel.pvdata.data.load_2MTF(root, eta_min=-0.1, eta_max=0.2, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, **kwargs)[source]

Load the 2MTF data from the given root directory.

candel.pvdata.data.load_SFI(root, eta_min=-0.1, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, **kwargs)[source]

Load the SFI++ data from the given root directory.

candel.pvdata.data.load_LOSS(root, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, **kwargs)[source]
candel.pvdata.data.load_Foundation(root, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, **kwargs)[source]
candel.pvdata.data.load_PantheonPlus_Lane(root, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, **kwargs)[source]
candel.pvdata.data.load_PantheonPlus(root, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, removed_PV_from_covmat=True, **kwargs)[source]

Load the Pantheon+ data from the given root directory, the covariance is expected to have peculiar velocity contribution removed.

candel.pvdata.data.load_SH0ES(root)[source]

Load the SH0ES data which can be used to sample distances.

NOTE: Set the zero-width prior to a delta prior so it is not sampled?

candel.pvdata.data.load_SH0ES_separated(root, cepheid_host_cz_cmb_max=None, los_data_path=None, rand_los_data_path=None)[source]

Load the separated SH0ES data, separating the Cepheid and supernovae and covariance matrices.

Structure of the covariance matrix indices:

  • Indices < 2150: Cepheid hosts without geometric anchors.

  • Index 2150: Start of NGC 4258 Cepheid hosts.

  • Index 2593: Start of M31 Cepheid hosts.

  • Index 2648: Start of LMC Cepheid hosts.

  • Index 3207: Uncertainty on HST zeropoint (sigma_HST).

  • Index 3208: Uncertainty on Gaia zeropoint (sigma_Gaia).

  • Index 3209: Prior on metallicity coefficient Z_W.

  • Index 3210: Unused term (likely placeholder).

  • Index 3211: Ground-based photometry systematic uncertainty (sigma_grnd).

  • Index 3212: Prior on P–L relation slope b_W.

  • Index 3213: Constraint on NGC 4258 anchor offset (delta_mu_N4258).

  • Index 3214: Constraint on LMC anchor offset (delta_mu_LMC).

candel.pvdata.data.load_SH0ES_from_config(config_path)[source]
candel.pvdata.data.load_CCHP_from_config(config_path, ra_dec_only=False)[source]

Load the processed CCHP TRGB catalogue from a TSV file.

Expects the TSV to contain at least the columns: SN, Galaxy, cz_cmb, e_czcmb, mu_TRGB_CCHP, sigma_TRGB_CCHP, m_Bprime_CSP, sigma_Bprime_CSP.

Set io.CSP.load_CSP_matches = true in config to load matched CSP data (st, BV, obs_vec, cov, RA, dec, stellar masses) with CSP_ prefix.

candel.pvdata.data.match_cchp_to_csp(cchp_data, csp_data)[source]

Match CCHP TRGB hosts to CSP SNe by SN name.

Handles naming convention differences: CCHP uses ‘2011fe’ while CSP uses ‘SN2011fe’.

Returns:

  • cchp_idx (ndarray) – Indices into cchp_data for matched SNe.

  • csp_idx (ndarray) – Indices into csp_data for matched SNe.

candel.pvdata.data.load_CSP_from_config(config_path)[source]

Load CSP SNe data from config, wrapped in PVDataFrame for inference.

Uses config keys: - io.CSP.root: path to CSP data directory - io.CSP.which_sample: sample to select (“CSPI”, “CSPII”, or “LSQ”) - model.r_limits_malmquist: radial grid limits for Malmquist bias - model.num_points_malmquist: number of grid points

candel.pvdata.data.arcsec_to_radian(arcsec)[source]
candel.pvdata.data.load_SDSS_FP(root, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, **kwargs)[source]

Load the SDSS FP data from the given root directory.

candel.pvdata.data.load_6dF_FP(root, which_band=None, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=7.5, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, **kwargs)[source]

Load the 6dF FP data from the given root directory.

candel.pvdata.data.load_generic(filepath, los_data_path=None, **kwargs)[source]

Load generic catalog data from a .txt file with column names.

Expected columns: RA, dec, Vcmb (in CMB frame).

candel.pvdata.data.load_CSP(root, zcmb_min=None, zcmb_max=None, b_min=None, quality_min=None, st_min=None, st_max=None, t0_min=None, t0_max=None, phys_only=False, exclude_phys=True, which_sample=None, los_data_path=None, return_all=False, remove_duplicates=True, **kwargs)[source]

Load CSP (Carnegie Supernova Project) SNe Ia data.

Merges photometry from B_all_noj21.csv with coordinates from cspallcal_sncoords.csv, csp_sncoords.csv, and missing_coords_simbad.csv.

Parameters:

  • which_sample (str, optional) – Sample to select: “CSPI”, “CSPII”, or “LSQ”.

  • exclude_phys (bool) – If True, exclude physics sample (phys=0 only).
